fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the fixed asset.

fields.name: Search Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a search description for the fixed asset.

fields.name: FA Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the class that the fixed asset belongs to.

fields.name: FA Subclass Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the subclass of the class that the fixed asset belongs to.

fields.name: FA Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location, such as a building, where the fixed asset is located.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor from which you purchased this fixed asset.

fields.name: Main Asset/Component
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the fixed asset is a main fixed asset or a component of a fixed asset.

fields.name: Component of Main Asset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the main fixed asset.

fields.name: Budgeted Asset
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the asset is for budgeting purposes.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warranty expiration date of the fixed asset.

fields.name: Responsible Employee
fields.tooltip: Specifies which employee is responsible for the fixed asset.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fixed asset's serial number.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies when the fixed asset card was last modified.

fields.name: Insured
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the fixed asset is linked to an insurance policy.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Maintenance Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor who performs repairs and maintenance on the fixed asset.

fields.name: Under Maintenance
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the fixed asset is currently being repaired.

fields.name: Next Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next scheduled service date for the fixed asset. This is used as a filter in the Maintenance - Next Service report.

fields.name: Inactive
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the fixed asset is inactive (for example, if the asset is not in service or is obsolete).

fields.name: Acquired
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the fixed asset has been acquired.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture that has been inserted for the fixed asset.
